title: retrieval-task work-unit-kind stub (0.2.0)
description: Stub spec for the retrieval-task identifier registered into work-unit.kind per D29. Real retrieval-task payload schema (query/k/corpus-binding/etc.) is Phase D+ pioneer-instance territory; this stub exists to demonstrate the vocabulary-registration spec-ref resolution path per D2 strict protocol-neutrality + D38 (knowledge composes via existing primitives). The 0.2.0 version preserves the 0.1.0 stub identifier resolution while the extension's specialist provision swaps to rag-realwire-specialist per D75.
